title: Attachment Patterns in Relationships
description: Early attachment experiences often shape how people behave in close relationships — whether they tend to seek closeness anxiously, avoid intimacy, or swing between both. These patterns can create recurring difficulties in romantic and emotional connections.
observation_language: It seems like there’s a pattern in how you respond when you feel emotionally close to or distant from someone important.
There appears to be a recurring theme around fear of abandonment or fear of being too dependent in relationships.
It looks like past experiences may be influencing how safe or unsafe closeness feels in your current relationships.
